calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Aug-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated July 24, 2012 is admitted to probate. Brittney Chorpenning and Alisha Henn are appointed as the Co-Administrators of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for February 9, 2027 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Continued To Aug-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
